tools.public_surface: Reusable agent tool-plane runtime, local harness, policy-aware dispatch, and MCP/server adapters.
tools.runtime_state: Configurable external state only; no tracked runtime data.
tools.migration_action: Keep and productize as first public-tool batch.

tools.public_surface: No public catalog surface in current form.
tools.runtime_state: Current int-tools-mcp mixes IntBrain memory search with readonly control calls.
tools.target_home: IntBrain surfaces move outside tools; lock/control status belongs to tool-specific adapters.
tools.migration_action: Split or remove after recorded destination and dry-run diff; do not preserve IntBrain search/fetch in tools.

tools.public_surface: Public wrappers, packaged plugins, operator entrypoints, and sanitized examples.
tools.runtime_state: Codex home, secrets, policy state, runtime logs, and legacy overlays are outside public source.
tools.target_home: D:/int/tools/codex for public wrappers/plugins; D:/int governance/runtime contours for private policy.
tools.migration_action: Keep public bin/plugins; move or remove legacy/private assets after dry-run approval.

tools.public_surface: Installable operator CLI for guarded Postgres/Supabase profiles and migration checks.
tools.runtime_state: Local .env stays untracked; runtime artifacts stay outside tracked source.
tools.migration_action: Keep and productize as public first-party CLI tool.

tools.public_surface: Sanitized templates and reusable delivery helpers.
tools.runtime_state: Live host configs, credentials, private host playbooks, logs, and deploy state stay outside public source.
tools.target_home: D:/int/tools/delivery for sanitized helpers; D:/int/.runtime/delivery or master-private governance for private machinery.
tools.migration_action: Audit and split public templates from private/live host machinery before cleanup.

tools.public_surface: CLI and hook templates for gate receipts, approvals, and commit binding.
tools.runtime_state: State directory must be configurable; default runtime state is outside tracked source.
tools.migration_action: Keep and productize with public docs, tests, and optional tool-specific MCP.

tools.public_surface: Reference/vendor copy only; not an owned public intTools tool in current form.
tools.runtime_state: Local OAuth/session material stays in user/runtime homes, never tracked.
tools.target_home: D:/int/references/gemini-openai-proxy as read-only master reference submodule.
tools.migration_action: Move to master reference after approval, or replace with catalog link.

tools.public_surface: CLI for scoped file lease coordination with install wrappers and tests.
tools.runtime_state: State directory must be configurable; lock database and events are runtime-only.
tools.migration_action: Keep and productize with public docs, non-intData defaults, and optional readonly MCP.

tools.target_home: Owning public tool, master-private path, or removal.
tools.migration_action: Classify each file and move to owner tool or delete after approval.

tools.public_surface: Generalized integration helpers, templates, and public runbook material only.
tools.runtime_state: OpenClaw home, workspace, secrets, and private runtime policy stay outside tracked source.
tools.target_home: D:/int/tools/openclaw for generalized helpers; user/runtime homes for live state.
tools.migration_action: Audit and split private runtime parts before cleanup.

tools.public_surface: No generic public tool surface in current form.
tools.runtime_state: Probe runtime state belongs to the probe contour.
tools.target_home: D:/int/probe unless generalized into a public helper.
tools.migration_action: Move to probe contour or productize separately after audit.

tools.runtime_state: No tracked runtime state; command output stays in caller-selected temp/runtime paths.
tools.migration_action: Keep and productize as reusable repo operations toolkit.

tools.public_surface: Domain adapter tool only if audit confirms no private client coupling.
tools.runtime_state: Runtime credentials/config must remain external and example-only in git.
tools.target_home: D:/int/tools/roistat if public-safe; otherwise master reference or product contour.
tools.migration_action: Audit before declaring stable public adapter.

tools.public_surface: Public sanitizer and runtime garbage-collection helpers only.
tools.runtime_state: Private vault policy, secrets, and live runtime state stay outside tools.
tools.target_home: D:/int/tools/vault for sanitizer/GC; private vault policy outside public repo.
tools.migration_action: Keep only public sanitizer/GC surface after audit.

tools.public_surface: Static public catalog site; source belongs to master web contour, not public tools.
tools.migration_action: Move/merge site files into master web contour; remove legacy copy after approval.

tools.target_home: External upstream or master read-only reference submodule if actively studied.
tools.migration_action: Keep as website/catalog metadata only; do not import copied source into tools.
